parameters.query:
SELECT
  md.user_id,
  debt_elem->>'name' AS debt_name,
  debt_elem->>'dueDate' AS due_date,
  'debt' AS kind
FROM module_data md
CROSS JOIN jsonb_array_elements(
  COALESCE(md.data->'d', md.data->'manualDebts', '[]'::jsonb)
) AS debt_elem
WHERE md.module = 'finyk'
  AND debt_elem->>'dueDate' IS NOT NULL
  AND debt_elem->>'paid' IS DISTINCT FROM 'true'
  AND (debt_elem->>'dueDate')::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM push_subscriptions ps
    WHERE ps.user_id = md.user_id AND ps.deleted_at IS NULL
  )
UNION ALL
SELECT
  md.user_id,
  recv_elem->>'name' AS debt_name,
  recv_elem->>'dueDate' AS due_date,
  'receivable' AS kind
FROM module_data md
CROSS JOIN jsonb_array_elements(
  COALESCE(md.data->'r', md.data->'receivables', '[]'::jsonb)
) AS recv_elem
WHERE md.module = 'finyk'
  AND recv_elem->>'dueDate' IS NOT NULL
  AND recv_elem->>'paid' IS DISTINCT FROM 'true'
  AND (recv_elem->>'dueDate')::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 days'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM push_subscriptions ps
    WHERE ps.user_id = md.user_id AND ps.deleted_at IS NULL
  )
ORDER BY due_date

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "userId": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "title": "{{ $json.kind === 'debt' ? '💸 Борг' : '💰 Дебіторка' }}: {{ $json.debt_name }}",
  "body": "Термін: {{ $json.due_date }} — відкрий Фінік для деталей",
  "module": "finyk",
  "tag": "debt-reminder"
}
